name: evidence_block_only_context_coverage_wrapper
description:
Pins the SECOND arm of the Step 1.65 deterministic no-evidence gate -- specifically `evidence_block.is_only_context == True` when `text is not None`. Complements evidence_block_empty_text_but_artifact_true.json (which pins the `text is None` arm of the same OR). Together the two cases pin the complete OR contract; a regression in either half (swapping the OR for an AND, deleting one branch, reordering with a typo) breaks at least one of them.

Step D (2026-06-11): the no-evidence gate ABSTAINS rather than minting confident Non-Compliant. Zero decision-quality evidence is *Unknown*, not a finding (88% of the prior confident-NC rows disagreed with the gold reviewer; this context-only wrapper shape was a large slice of that error). Per feedback_precision_over_recall.md, when the only thing in the bundle is framing the assessor abstains -- it does NOT let the LLM hallucinate an affirmation against a phantom artifact, AND it does NOT assert a false Non-Compliant the reviewer must un-pick. The gate routes through _finalize_no_evidence_decision(context_only=True) -> _abstain: status coerced to None, proposed_status left None, source='abstain', needs_review=True, review_reason prefixed 'no-evidence:'. accepted stays True so the row is persisted; the export gates filter on needs_review to keep it out of the workbook/POAM bundle.

Why this case exists -- the production failure mode: before is_only_context was added to the gate, 91 untagged CCIs in a CM-8/CM-6/CA-3/CA-7/PM-5/RA-5 family slice were passed to the LLM with a bundle whose text was nothing but the workbook-wide asset coverage report header. The model affirmed those CCIs at confidence 0.7-0.9 because the wrapper text 'looks like evidence' (mentions hosts, asset counts, scan coverage percentages).

Mechanism trace:
  - evidence_block.text = realistic asset coverage report wrapper string (non-None, non-empty).
  - has_artifacts=False, has_findings=False, has_hosts=False, has_coverage=True.
  - is_only_context property at evidence_bundle.py:107-115: `text is not None and not (has_artifacts or has_findings or has_hosts)` -> True and not (False or False or False) -> True and True -> True.
  - the gate evaluates `text is None or is_only_context` -> False or True -> True.
  - _finalize_no_evidence_decision fires with context_only=True (the bundle carried workbook-wide framing but no per-CCI artifact). Routes through _abstain. Returns Decision(accepted=True, status=None, proposed_status=None, narrative='Workbook-wide context was available for this CCI, but no artifact substantiating the control objective was retrieved. With no evidence of implementation available to examine, the assessor is unable to determine compliance; this row is flagged for manual review.', narrative_class=AMBIGUOUS, source='abstain', needs_review=True, review_reason='no-evidence: workbook-wide context was retrieved...'). The context_only narrative arm is DISTINCT from the plain text-is-None arm ('No artifacts were retrieved...') -- when framing context is present, claiming 'no artifacts were retrieved' would be indefensible to a 3PAO, so the wording discriminates while the abstain verdict stays identical.
  - llm_stub_proposals is empty -> any LLM call would raise IndexError from StubLlmClient. Zero recorded calls proves the short-circuit fired before reaching the LLM path.

Load-bearing isolation -- nothing else can mask the is_only_context arm:
  - text is deliberately populated and substantive (>200 chars) so a regression that re-routed text-populated bundles to the LLM would call into the stub and the empty queue would raise IndexError -- distinguishing 'gate fired correctly' from 'gate silently bypassed'.
  - has_artifacts=False is the load-bearing flip vs the sibling case. The sibling pins (text=None, has_artifacts=True); this case pins (text=non-empty, has_artifacts=False). If the gate were mistakenly rewritten as `if text is None and not has_artifacts:` (collapsing OR to AND with both predicates flipped), both this case AND the sibling would fail.
  - has_findings=False, has_hosts=False are essential -- if either were True, is_only_context would return False, the gate would not fire, the case would go to the LLM, and the empty stub queue would raise. The case asserts those three booleans are the AUTHORITATIVE 'is there evidence' signals, not text length or content shape.
  - has_coverage=True is realism only -- it does NOT participate in is_only_context. Set True because the canonical production failure mode is the asset_coverage_report wrapper; a case with has_coverage=False would still pin the same code path but would be less faithful to the documented regression.
  - tagged_evidence is set to a non-empty string so the legacy string-empty arm would NOT fire on its own. This proves the EvidenceBlock arm took the gate, not the legacy fallback.
  - force_llm is implicitly False. The no-evidence gate only runs in the `if not force_llm:` branch.
  - No CRM context, no narrative override, no inherited marker -- removes confounders. The only thing being tested is the is_only_context precedence inside the no-evidence gate.

Substrate -- CM-8 / CCI-000389 (Information System Component Inventory: develops and documents an inventory of information system components) is the canonical control family where asset_coverage_report wrappers appear (CM-8/CM-6/CA-3/CA-7/PM-5/RA-5). A bundle for a CM-8 CCI that has the workbook-wide ACAS coverage header attached but zero per-CCI tagged artifacts is the EXACT shape of the 91-CCI production regression.

Mutation differentiation:
  - Swap `or` for `and` (`text is None and is_only_context`): with text=non-empty and is_only_context=True, the AND evaluates to (False and True) = False -> gate does NOT fire -> row routes to LLM -> empty stub queue raises IndexError -> case fails loudly.
  - Delete the is_only_context half (e.g. `if evidence_block.text is None:`): same outcome -- text=non-empty bypasses, LLM called, stub raises.
  - Invert is_only_context internally (`return self.text is None and ...`): with text=non-empty the property returns False -> gate does NOT fire -> same failure mode.
  - Drop the `or` arm and check has_artifacts only: would still fire here because has_artifacts=False -- caught instead by the sibling evidence_block_empty_text_but_artifact_true (has_artifacts=True, text=None). Cross-case coverage by design.

The assertion uses status=null, proposed_status=null, source_in=['abstain'], needs_review=true, accepted=true, llm_calls=0, narrative_contains_regex='no artifact substantiating the control objective was retrieved' (the context_only arm's discriminating substring, not the plain text-is-None 'No artifacts were retrieved'), AND review_reason_contains_regex='no-evidence'. Orthogonal pin points -- a regression in verdict, source-stamping, review-flag, accepted-flag, LLM-call-count, narrative template, or review_reason prefix all fail loudly.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization develops and documents an inventory of information system components that accurately reflects the current information system.
ccis_row.procedures: Examine the information system component inventory and confirm it accurately reflects the current information system composition.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- ACAS scan coverage report referenced in workbook header; no per-CCI inventory artifact tagged.

evidence_block.text:
## Asset coverage report
Workbook-wide ACAS scan coverage: 87 of 92 declared hosts scanned in the most recent 30-day window. Coverage gaps: 5 hosts (lab subnet) with no scan in window. No per-objective artifacts retrieved for this CCI.

expected.narrative_contains_regex: no artifact substantiating the control objective was retrieved
